meaning: n.海上龙卷风,排水管,排水槽,排水口
examples: A waterspout touches down near a boat near Dubrovnik, Croatia, in August 2007.
A scientist said they were probably picked up by a waterspout or mini-tornado out at sea.
A scientist said they were probably picked up by a waterspout or mini - tornado out at sea.
If the funnel cloud touches down at sea we get what is known as a waterspout.
Unidentified Child: (Singing) Itsy-bitsy spider crawled up the waterspout.
